title: Dialqueue
problem: Throxy's entire moat is "we find the right human in a traditional industry that LinkedIn/Apollo can't surface." But the public artifact that proves this — an ICP to decision maker mapper for manufacturing/logistics/3PLs — does not exist. Today their AI Engineer role (YC) implies they're still doing this with internal Python + scraper duct tape. Meanwhile the cold calling team has a separate, unsolved problem: call list prioritization. They have ~10M emails sent and ~60 SDRs dialing daily (throxy.
direction: A vertical, NAICS aware call prioritization engine that turns Throxy's human callers from "dial the next row" into a 3 7x higher connect/qualified meeting rate, with a short local demo of the rebuilt daily queue.
why: Contextual bandits + doubly robust OPE on a call floor is unusual. Most ad tech CB practitioners ship CB for impressions; almost nobody applies it to a 60 SDR human dialer. The DR OPE step in particular means we can ship a policy change without a 6 week A/B that costs the floor real meetings.

archetypes.name: throxy evidence replay
archetypes.trigger: throxy signal changes while entire context is stale
archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

archetypes.name: entire boundary probe
archetypes.trigger: entire handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

archetypes.name: right regression harness
archetypes.trigger: right behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

archetypes.name: human operator packet
archetypes.trigger: human output needs a human-readable audit packet
archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
